decisions.definition: All frozen identity, structure, program, production and visual-integrity inputs remain equivalent.
decisions.requiredAction: Record inherited contract references; no design change permitted.

decisions.definition: Frozen identity and core structure remain unchanged, but a bounded environment or scale variable changed.
decisions.requiredAction: Run every local check named by the matched trigger before release.

decisions.definition: Compatibility cannot be proven from Phase 1 contracts or production evidence alone.
decisions.requiredAction: Obtain documented human compatibility review; do not generate assets.

decisions.definition: A frozen identity, core structure, Material DNA, age, program or team-recognition boundary changed.
decisions.requiredAction: Stop inheritance and reopen every affected Gate from its authoritative source.

resolutionRules.reason: A lower-severity rule may never downgrade a stricter boundary.
Compatibility must not be inferred from incomplete evidence.
The inherited nine-stage Phase 1 validation contract is mandatory.
Phase 2 cannot redefine or override Phase 1 Rule IDs.
